raw_output_payload.reasoning: We need to split a tar.gz file into chunks of at most 10 MiB. Use split -b 10M? But need to preserve file? Actually split the output of the tar.gz? Probably split the file itself. Use split -b 10M /workspace/archive.tar.gz output_prefix. That creates files output_prefixaa etc. That's it.
